name: Wheat Germ Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Apple Juice, bottled or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the required temperature.
2. In a large bowl, combine water, egg beaters, apple juice, maple sugar, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, gluten, and wheat germ.
3. Add whole-wheat flour and yeast to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
5. Place the pan in the preheated oven.
6. Bake for the specified time or until golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
